note: The signature-permission-guarded decoy (GuardedForwardActivity). Even if the static stage had filed it, the dynamic probe is REFUTED — the guard holds. Defense in depth: guard_held is a correctness win, not a promotion.

observation.evidence: adb am start -n com.canary.app/.GuardedForwardActivity rejected: java.lang.SecurityException Permission Denial — requires com.canary.app.permission.PRIVILEGED (protectionLevel=signature)
